title: Agent Fundamentals
description: Test your knowledge of AI agent design and implementation

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of an AI agent?
options: To autonomously perform tasks and make decisions
To store large amounts of data
questions.explanation: AI agents are designed to autonomously perform tasks and make decisions based on their environment and goals.

questions.question: Which component is essential for an AI agent to learn from experience?
questions.explanation: A feedback mechanism allows agents to learn from their actions and improve over time.

questions.question: What is 'context window' in relation to AI models?
options: The browser window where AI runs
The maximum amount of text a model can process at once
The time period for model training
The user interface for model configuration
questions.explanation: The context window defines how much information an AI model can consider in a single interaction.

questions.question: Which strategy helps manage limited context windows?
questions.explanation: Summarization and chunking help fit relevant information within context limits.

questions.question: What is 'prompt engineering'?
options: Designing effective instructions for AI models
questions.explanation: Prompt engineering is the practice of designing and optimizing inputs to get desired outputs from AI models.
